text: Uses/recommends uv for environments + packaging, and explicitly avoids pip / poetry / virtualenv (for the review task, calls out replacing them).
Mandates a src/ layout for a production project, not a flat layout (for the review task, flags the flat layout as a fix).
Configures ruff for both linting and formatting.
Sets up static type checking (ty or mypy).
Uses pytest (not unittest), and reaches for hypothesis / property-based testing where appropriate.
Adds fail-fast gates: pre-commit hooks and/or CI running lint + type-check + tests (+ a security/CVE audit such as pip-audit).
Recommends typed, fail-fast config (e.g. pydantic-settings) validated at startup rather than scattered os.environ reads.
